sn12.48:1.1:
1
Sāvatthiyaṁ vihārati. Atha kho lokāyatiko brāhmaṇo yena bhagavā … pe … ekamantaṁ nisinno kho lokāyatiko brāhmaṇo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
sn12.48:1.2:
2
"Kiṁ nu kho, bho gotama, sabbamatthī"ti? "‘Sabbamatthī’ti kho, brāhmaṇa, jeṭṭhametaṁ lokāyataṁ".
sn12.48:1.3:
3
"Kiṁ pana, bho gotama, sabbaṁ natthī"ti? "‘Sabbaṁ natthī’ti kho, brāhmaṇa, dutiyametaṁ lokāyataṁ".
sn12.48:1.4:
4
"Kiṁ nu kho, bho gotama, sabbamekattan"ti? "‘Sabbamekattan’ti kho, brāhmaṇa, tatiyametaṁ lokāyataṁ".
sn12.48:1.5:
5
"Kiṁ pana, bho gotama, sabbaṁ puthuttan"ti? "‘Sabbaṁ puthuttan’ti kho, brāhmaṇa, catutthametaṁ lokāyataṁ.
sn12.48:2.2:
6
Ete te, brāhmaṇa, ubho ante anupāgamma majjhena tathāgato dhammaṁ deseti: ‘avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārā; saṅkhārapaccayā viññāṇaṁ … pe … evametassa kevalassa dukkhakkhandhassa samudayo hoti. Avijjāya tveva asesavirāganirodhā saṅkhāranirodho; saṅkhāranirodhā viññāṇanirodho … pe … evametassa kevalassa dukkhakkhandhassa nirodho hotī’"ti.
sn12.48:3.2:
7
Evaṁ vutte, lokāyatiko brāhmaṇo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "Abhikkantaṁ, bho gotama … pe … ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan"ti.
Aṭṭhamaṁ.
